_comment: Starter MCP config for JARVIS. Fill in the placeholders, then run `claude mcp list` to verify. Several of these (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Canva, Windsor.ai) are also available as one-click connectors in the Claude apps — see docs/JARVIS-SETUP.md for which path to use for each. Entries you haven't set up yet can stay as-is; Claude Code will simply skip servers it can't reach.
